title: gentiana aestiva
intro: Gentiana aestiva, also known as the bitter gentian or gentian, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of gentian include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Gentian can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a bittering agent in some herbal remedies.
